revision.comment: transfer from print.css

Protected "[[Template:Sister project/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]], match parent ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

[[phab:T365622]] this has been bugging me for too long and this seems like the most reasonable fix here. Will follow up on talk page.
